title: Roles
description: Public job openings are published only when a role opening has cleared governed approval. The detail route architecture is active even when no public opening is currently live.

status.public_openings_state: Executive positions available for future hiring
status.note: Executive role pages are published as available positions. Formal applications open when each role clears recruitment approval.

openings.title: Chief Operating Officer
openings.summary: The operating leader who turns strategy into disciplined execution, delivery rhythm, measurable sequencing, and cross-functional alignment.

openings.title: Chief Financial Officer
openings.summary: The financial leader responsible for capital discipline, liquidity awareness, financial reporting, and sustainable institutional scaling.

openings.title: Chief Strategy Officer
openings.summary: The strategy leader responsible for long-range direction, market logic, expansion sequencing, and institutional positioning.

openings.title: Chief Science & Research Officer
openings.summary: The research leader who protects scientific defensibility, evidence discipline, research integrity, and responsible translation into product.

openings.title: Chief Cognitive Systems Officer
openings.summary: The cognitive systems leader responsible for conceptual architecture, terminology, epistemic coherence, and the structure of ICOS thinking.

openings.title: Chief Technology Officer
openings.summary: The technology leader responsible for software architecture, security, resilience, scalability, and production engineering discipline.

openings.title: Chief Brand & Aesthetic Officer
openings.summary: The brand and aesthetic leader responsible for identity, design language, visual discipline, naming, and perception architecture.

openings.title: Chief Publishing Officer
openings.summary: The publishing leader responsible for editorial standards, catalog architecture, rights discipline, and public knowledge release quality.

openings.title: Chief Records & Sonic Architecture Officer
openings.summary: The records and sonic architecture leader responsible for music, sonic identity, metadata, master ownership, and catalog continuity.

openings.title: Chief Risk & Ethics Officer
openings.summary: The risk and ethics leader responsible for exposure review, ethical governance, compliance alignment, and institutional survivability.

openings.title: General Counsel
openings.summary: The legal leader responsible for contracts, rights, governance legality, regulatory posture, disclosure discipline, and institutional protection.

openings.title: Chief Communications Officer
openings.summary: The communications leader responsible for narrative standards, public statements, crisis response, channel discipline, and message governance.

openings.title: Chief of Staff
openings.summary: The founder-support and executive coordination leader responsible for decision packets, prioritization, sequencing, and reality-check discipline.

openings.title: Corporate Secretary
openings.summary: The governance administration leader responsible for board process, minutes, resolutions, registers, formal records, and traceability.
